seo.title: Movie Poster Maker – AI Movie Poster Generator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Generate cinematic movie posters from your story ideas with AI and create key art concepts for trailers, launches, and campaigns.

hero.title: Movie Poster Maker
hero.description: Bring your movie idea to life with our powerful AI workflow template. Simply input your story-line, and our AI will instantly generate a high-quality, visually striking movie poster tailored to your plot.

steps.title: Summarize your film or story idea
steps.description: Provide a short synopsis, key characters, and genre notes so the workflow understands the core of your narrative.

steps.title: Choose tone, layout, and influences
steps.description: Describe the poster feeling—tense thriller, epic sci-fi, tender drama—and mention any reference films or styles you love.

steps.title: Generate AI movie poster concepts
steps.description: Run the Movie Poster Maker workflow to create multiple key art options tuned to your story, genre, and audience.

steps.title: Shortlist, refine, and reuse the workflow
steps.description: Pick your favorite concepts, tweak prompts or story details, and reuse the same setup across sequels, spin-offs, or related projects.

whoIsFor.title: Built for film and story-driven visuals
whoIsFor.subtitle: From indie films to streaming campaigns, see who uses AI movie posters to pitch and promote.

audiences.label: Directors & screenwriters

audiences.label: Indie film producers

items.question: What is the AI Movie Poster Maker template?
items.answer: AI Movie Poster Maker is a workflow that turns your story idea or script summary into cinematic movie poster designs. It’s an AI film poster generator tailored for directors, writers, and marketers.

items.question: What information should I provide for the best poster?
items.answer: Include your film’s logline, genre, main characters, and any visual references (e.g., “dark noir,” “bright family adventure”). This helps the AI align the design with your story.

items.question: Can this template create multiple poster concepts for A/B testing?
items.answer: Yes. You can generate multiple concepts with different prompts or styles and then compare them for audience tests and internal reviews.

items.question: Is the output suitable for print-quality posters?
items.answer: You can create high-resolution images, but final print specs depend on your export settings and use case. Many users generate concepts in OpenCreator and then upscale or refine them as needed.

items.question: Does the template support specific poster layouts (e.g., character montage, minimalistic)?
items.answer: You can describe layout preferences in your prompt (“character montage with central hero,” “minimalist title-only poster”). The AI uses these instructions as guidance for composition.

items.question: Can I use AI movie posters in marketing campaigns?
items.answer: Yes, you can use the generated art in teasers, decks, and social campaigns if it fits within your plan’s usage rights. Always confirm the commercial terms attached to your account.

items.question: How do credits and costs work for AI film poster generation?
items.answer: Each poster generation consumes credits. Complex or high-resolution generations may use more credits, so start with a few tests to find the style you like before scaling.
